mapper.select:
/* selectTransportCurrentRecord */ SELECT TP.VHPLNKY , TP.DOCCATE , TP.DOCTYPE , MDO.DOCCTNM , MDO.DOCTYNM , TP.WAREKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , TP.TPNSTAT , MC.COMCDTX as TPNAMLC , TPW.TOTALWEIG , TPW.RENAMLCS , TPW.REGIKEYS , TPW.CTREGIKY , TPW.MNRENAMLC , CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(TP.VHPDATE, '%Y/%m/%d'), ' ', CASE WHEN TP.VHPTIME IS NULL OR TRIM(TP.VHPTIME) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TP.VHPTIME, '%H%i%s') END ) as VHPDATE , CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(TP.STPITDT, '%Y/%m/%d'), ' ', CASE WHEN TP.STPITTM IS NULL OR TRIM(TP.STPITTM) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TP.STPITTM, '%H%i%s') END ) as STPITDT , CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(TP.TRNINDT, '%Y/%m/%d'), ' ', CASE WHEN TP.TRNINTM IS NULL OR TRIM(TP.TRNINTM) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TP.TRNINTM, '%H%i%s') END ) as TRNINDT , TP.TRNMEMO , TP.APROVYN , MCA.COMCDTX as APNAMLC , CONCAT ( DATE_FORMAT(TP.APROVDT, '%Y/%m/%d'), ' ', CASE WHEN TP.APROVTM IS NULL OR TRIM(TP.APROVTM) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(TP.APROVTM, '%H%i%s') END ) as APROVDT , TP.UPDTCHK , '${param.schema}' AS SCHEMA_NAME , TI.CUSTCOD , CASE WHEN TI.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.CUSTCOD) = '' THEN TI.CUSTNAM WHEN MCU.CUNAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MCU.CUNAMLC) = '' THEN TI.CUSTNAM ELSE MCU.CUNAMLC END AS CUSTNAM , TI.DESTMOD , CASE WHEN TI.DESTMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(TI.DESTMOD) = '' THEN TI.DEMODNM WHEN MDM.DENAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MDM.DENAMLC) = '' THEN TI.DEMODNM ELSE MDM.DENAMLC END AS DEMODNM , TI.DEMPOCD , TI.DEMDADR , TI.DEMDTLN , TI.DEMDMAN , TI.TPISTAT FROM ${param.schema}.TPLNHD TP INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MCODEM MC ON MC.COMCDKY = 'TPNSTAT' AND MC.COMCDVL = TP.TPNSTAT AND MC.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MCODEM MCA ON MCA.COMCDKY = 'APROVYN' AND MCA.COMCDVL = TP.APROVYN AND MCA.COUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.TPLNIT TI ON TI.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY AND TI.VHPLNKY = TP.VHPLNKY LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.MCUSMA MCU ON MCU.CUSTKEY = TI.CUSTCOD AND MCU.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.MDESMA MDM ON MDM.REGIKEY = TI.REGIMOD AND MDM.CUSTKEY = TI.OWNERKY AND MDM.DESTKEY = TI.DESTMOD AND MDM.DEUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ( SELECT TW.VHPLNKY, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TW.REGIKEY SEPARATOR ', ') AS REGIKEYS, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MR.RENAMLC ORDER BY MR.RENAMLC ASC SEPARATOR ', ') AS RENAMLCS, COUNT(TW.REGIKEY) AS CTREGIKY, MIN(MR.RENAMLC) AS MNRENAMLC, SUM(TW.ALCWEIG) AS TOTALWEIG FROM ${param.schema}.TPWPWG TW INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = TW.REGIKEY AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY TW.VHPLNKY HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN TW.WPLCFYN != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN TW.OOUCFYN != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN TW.SHPCFYN != 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ) TPW ON TPW.VHPLNKY = TP.VHPLNKY INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MDOCMA MDO ON MDO.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY AND MDO.DOCCATE = TP.DOCCATE AND MDO.DOCTYPE = TP.DOCTYPE AND MDO.DOUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE TP.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND TP.TPNSTAT NOT IN ('FINISH', 'CANCEL', 'REFUSAL', 'PLAN') AND TP.APROVYN = 'APPROVAL' GROUP BY TP.VHPLNKY, TP.WAREKEY, MW.WHNAMLC, TP.TPNSTAT , TP.TRNMEMO, TP.APROVYN, MCA.COMCDTX, MC.COMCDTX , TI.CUSTCOD, TI.CUSTNAM, TI.DESTMOD, TI.DEMODNM, TI.DEMPOCD , TI.DEMDADR, TI.DEMDTLN, TI.DEMDMAN, TI.TPISTAT ORDER BY TP.VHPLNKY DESC
LIMIT #{param.limit}
/* selectRegikeyList */ SELECT MR.REGIKEY , MR.RENAMLC , MR.REGADDR , MR.REUSEYN FROM ${param.schema}.MREGMA MR WHERE MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY BINARY MR.RENAMLC ASC

/* selectVehicleList */ SELECT SH.USERKEY , MV.VHCSNAM , MV.VHCFNAM , MV.DRVERNM , SH.VEHICKY , SH.VOWNKEY FROM ${param.commonSchema}.SUSRVH SH INNER JOIN ${param.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MV ON MV.VOWNKEY = SH.VOWNKEY AND MV.VEHICKY = SH.VEHICKY AND MV.VHUSEYN = 'Y' AND SH.VHUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE SH.USERKEY = #{param.userkey}

/* selectRequestApprovalList */ SELECT TP.VHPLNKY , TP.VEHICKY , TP.WAREKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , TPW.REGIKEYS , TPW.RENAMLCS , TPW.TOTALWEIG , TP.TRNMEMO , TP.UPDTCHK , '${param.schema}' AS SCHEMA_NAME , TPI.DEMODNMS FROM ${param.schema}.TPLNHD TP INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ( SELECT TW.VHPLNKY, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TW.REGIKEY SEPARATOR ', ') AS REGIKEYS, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MR.RENAMLC ORDER BY MR.RENAMLC ASC SEPARATOR ', ') AS RENAMLCS, SUM(TW.ALCWEIG) AS TOTALWEIG FROM ${param.schema}.TPWPWG TW INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = TW.REGIKEY AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY TW.VHPLNKY ) TPW ON TPW.VHPLNKY = TP.VHPLNKY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TI.VHPLNKY, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT TI.DEMODNM SEPARATOR ', ') AS DEMODNMS FROM ${param.schema}.TPLNIT TI GROUP BY TI.VHPLNKY ) TPI ON TPI.VHPLNKY = TP.VHPLNKY WHERE TP.APROVYN = 'STAY' AND TP.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} GROUP BY TP.VHPLNKY, TP.VEHICKY, TP.WAREKEY, MW.WHNAMLC

SELECT OH.OUTBOKY , OH.WAREKEY , OH.VOWNKEY , OH.VEHICKY , OH.SHPWEIG , OH.OBODATE , OH.OBOTIME , OH.OBOSTAT , OH.UPDTCHK , '${param.schema}' AS SCHEMA_NAME FROM ${param.schema}.OOUBHD OH WHERE OH.VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND OH.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND (OH.ENTDATE IS NULL OR OH.ENTDATE = '') AND (OH.ENTTIME IS NULL OR OH.ENTTIME = '') AND OH.OBOSTAT = 'NEW'

/* selectAlarmList */ SELECT AL.ALARMKY , AL.WAREKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , AL.VOWNKEY , AL.VEHICKY , AL.USERACT , AL.ALRMCOD , MC.COMCDTX , AL.ALARMTI , AL.ALARMDT , AL.CREDATE , AL.CRETIME , AL.CREUSER , '${param.schema}' AS SCHEMA_NAME FROM ${param.schema}.ALRMHI AL INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = AL.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MCODEM MC ON MC.COMCDKY = 'ALRMCOD' AND MC.COMCDVL = AL.ALRMCOD AND MC.COUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${param.commonSchema}.SUSRVH SH ON SH.USERKEY = #{param.userkey} AND SH.USERACT = #{param.useract} AND SH.VOWNKEY = AL.VOWNKEY AND SH.VEHICKY = AL.VEHICKY AND SH.VHUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE AL.VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND AL.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND AL.USERACT = #{param.useract} ORDER BY AL.CREDATE DESC, AL.CRETIME DESC

/* selectWasnhdList */ SELECT WH.EOASNKY , WH.WAREKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(WH.ASNDATE, '%Y/%m/%d'), ' ', CASE WHEN WH.ASNTIME IS NULL OR TRIM(WH.ASNTIME) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(WH.ASNTIME, '%H%i%s') END )as ASNDATE , WH.UPDTCHK , '${param.schema}' AS SCHEMA_NAME FROM ${param.schema}.WASNHD WH INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WH.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE WH.VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND WH.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND WH.ASNSTAT = 'NEW'
AND WH.ASNDATE BETWEEN #{param.asndateFrom} AND #{param.asndateTo}

/* selectWasnitList */ SELECT WI.EOASNKY , WI.EOASNIT , WI.WAREKEY , WI.OWNRNAM , WI.SKUWIDT , WI.SKULENG , WI.SKUTHIC , WI.SKUWEIG , WI.STKMEMO , WI.STLAYER , WI.REGIORG , WI.REGIMOD , WI.SKUMKEY , (CASE WHEN WI.REGIMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.REGIMOD) = '' THEN WI.REGIORG ELSE WI.REGIMOD END) as REGIKEY , MR.RENAMLC , WI.ASNDQTY , WI.UPDTCHK FROM ${param.schema}.WASNIT WI INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = (CASE WHEN WI.REGIMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.REGIMOD) = '' THEN WI.REGIORG ELSE WI.REGIMOD END) AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE WI.EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky} AND WI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} ORDER BY WI.STLAYER DESC

/* selectAppOperationLog */ SELECT DATE_FORMAT(TP.TRNINDT, '%m-%d') as TRNINDT , COUNT(DISTINCT TP.VHPLNKY) AS DAY , SUM(TI.SKUWEIG) as ITEMWEIG FROM ${param.schema}.TPLNHD TP INNER JOIN ${param.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MV ON MV.VOWNKEY = TP.VOWNKEY AND MV.VEHICKY = TP.VEHICKY AND MV.VHUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.TPLNIT TI ON TI.WAREKEY = TP.WAREKEY AND TI.VHPLNKY = TP.VHPLNKY WHERE TP.TPNSTAT = 'FINISH' AND DATE_FORMAT(TP.TRNINDT, '%Y') = #{param.dtyear} AND DATE_FORMAT(TP.TRNINDT, '%m') = #{param.dtmonth} AND TP.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} GROUP BY TP.VEHICKY, MV.VHCSNAM, MV.VHCFNAM, TP.TRNINDT
/* selectAlarmky */ SELECT ${schema}.FN_TM_ALARMKY() AS ALARMKY FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: /* insertAlrmhi */ INSERT INTO ${param.schema}.ALRMHI ( ALARMKY, WAREKEY, VOWNKEY, VEHICKY, USERACT, ALRMCOD, ALARMTI, ALARMDT, CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER ) VALUES ( #{param.alarmky}, #{param.warekey}, #{param.vownkey}, #{param.vehicky}, #{param.useract}, #{param.alrmcod}, #{param.alarmti}, #{param.alarmdt}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW() ,'%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{param.creuser}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%H%i%s'), #{param.lmouser} )
mapper.select: /* selectAppReleaseItemList */ SELECT WI.CUSTCOD , CASE WHEN WI.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.CUSTCOD) = '' THEN WI.CUSTNAM WHEN MCU.CUNAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MCU.CUNAMLC) = '' THEN WI.CUSTNAM ELSE MCU.CUNAMLC END AS CUSTNAM , MCU.CUSTELN , WI.DESTMOD , CASE WHEN WI.DESTMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.DESTMOD) = '' THEN WI.DEMODNM WHEN MDM.DENAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MDM.DENAMLC) = '' THEN WI.DEMODNM ELSE MDM.DENAMLC END AS DEMODNM , MDM.DESMEMO , WI.DEMDMAN , WI.DEMDADR , WI.DEMPOCD , WI.DEMDTLN , WI.SKUMKEY , WI.SKUTHIC , WI.SKUWIDT , WI.SKULENG , WI.SKUWEIG , WI.STKMEMO , WI.REGIMOD , MR.RENAMLC FROM ${param.schema}.WSHPIT WI LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.MCUSMA MCU ON MCU.CUSTKEY = WI.CUSTCOD AND MCU.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.MDESMA MDM ON MDM.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MDM.CUSTKEY = WI.OWNERKY AND MDM.DESTKEY = WI.DESTMOD AND MDM.DEUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE WI.SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky}

/* selectAppWplnit */ SELECT WI.SHPPLKY , WI.SHPPLIT , WI.WPLITST , WI.DOCCATE , WI.DOCTYPE , WI.WAREKEY , WI.OWNRNAM , WI.STOCKKY , WI.REGIORG , WI.DEORGNM , WI.SKUGRKY , WI.REGIMOD , WI.DEMODNM , WI.CUSTNAM , WI.SKUMKEY , WI.SKUDESC , WI.EMSKUYN , WI.CHKDISP , WI.SKUWEIG , WI.SKUWIDT , WI.SKULENG , WI.SKUTHIC , WI.STKMEMO , WI.GROSSWD , WI.GROSSLN , WI.GROSSTH , WI.GROSSWG , WI.PLANQTY , WI.SUOMKEY , WI.ITEMCOD , WI.PURCNUM , WI.ORDERLN , WI.SHPLIMT , WI.DELVDSR , WI.UPDTCHK FROM ${param.schema}.WPLNIT WI WHERE WI.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky} AND WI.SHPPLIT = #{param.shpplit} AND WI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey}
/* selectAppTpwpwgList */ SELECT VHPLNKY , SHPPLKY , ALCWEIG , PLNSIZE , REGIKEY , WPLCFYN , OOUCFYN , SHPCFYN , ARRIVYN , UPDTCHK FROM ${param.schema}.TPWPWG WHERE VHPLNKY = #{param.vhplnky}

/* selectAppWplnhd */ SELECT WH.SHPPLKY , WH.WAREKEY , WH.REGIKEY , WH.SHPWEIG , WH.REMWEIG , WH.SKUGRKY , WH.WPLDATE , WH.WPLTIME , WH.DOCCATE , WH.DOCTYPE , WH.RSNCODE , WH.PARSNNM , WH.UPDTCHK FROM ${param.schema}.WPLNHD WH WHERE WH.SHPPLKY = #{param.shpplky}

/* selectAppCarryRecordList*/ SELECT WA.EOASNKY , WA.WAREKEY , MW.WHNAMLC , WA.DOCCATE , WA.DOCTYPE , MD.DOCCTNM , MD.DOCTYNM , WA.ASNSTAT , MC.COMCDTX , CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(WA.ASNDATE, '%Y/%m/%d'), ' ', CASE WHEN WA.ASNTIME IS NULL OR TRIM(WA.ASNTIME) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(WA.ASNTIME, '%H%i%s') END )as ASNDATE , CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(WA.ENTDATE, '%Y/%m/%d'), ' ', CASE WHEN WA.ENTTIME IS NULL OR TRIM(WA.ENTTIME) = '' THEN '' ELSE STR_TO_DATE(WA.ENTTIME, '%H%i%s') END )as ENTDATE , '${param.schema}' AS SCHEMA_NAME , WA.UPDTCHK , MAR.AREANAM , (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT MARE.AREANAM SEPARATOR ' / ') FROM ${param.schema}.WASNIT WI INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MAREMA MARE ON MARE.WAREKEY = WI.WAREKEY AND MARE.AREAKEY = WI.TOAREKY AND MARE.ARUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE WI.EOASNKY = WA.EOASNKY ) AS GROUPAREA FROM ${param.schema}.WASNHD WA INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MDOCMA MD ON MD.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND MD.DOCCATE = WA.DOCCATE AND MD.DOCTYPE = WA.DOCTYPE AND MD.DOUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MCODEM MC ON MC.COMCDKY = 'ASNSTAT' AND MC.COMCDVL = WA.ASNSTAT AND MC.COUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.MAREMA MAR ON MAR.WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND MAR.AREAKEY = (SELECT TOAREKY FROM ${param.schema}.WASNIT WHERE EOASNKY = WA.EOASNKY AND WAREKEY = WA.WAREKEY AND STLAYER = (SELECT MAX(STLAYER) FROM ${param.schema}.WASNIT WHERE EOASNKY = WA.EOASNKY) ) AND MAR.ARUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE WA.VOWNKEY = #{param.vownkey} AND WA.VEHICKY = #{param.vehicky} AND WA.ASNDATE BETWEEN #{param.asndateFrom} AND #{param.asndateTo} AND (WA.ENTDATE IS NOT NULL OR TRIM(WA.ENTDATE) != '') AND (WA.ENTTIME IS NOT NULL OR TRIM(WA.ENTTIME) != '')

/* selectAppCarryRecordItemList */ SELECT WI.EOASNKY , WI.WAREKEY , WI.REGIMOD , MR.RENAMLC , WI.CUSTCOD , CASE WHEN WI.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.CUSTCOD) = '' THEN WI.CUSTNAM WHEN MC.CUNAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MC.CUNAMLC) = '' THEN WI.CUSTNAM ELSE MC.CUNAMLC END AS CUSTNAM , MC.CUSTELN , CASE WHEN WI.DESTMOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.DESTMOD) = '' THEN WI.DEMODNM WHEN MD.DENAMLC IS NULL OR TRIM(MD.DENAMLC) = '' THEN WI.DEMODNM ELSE MD.DENAMLC END AS DEMODNM , MD.DESMEMO , WI.DEMDMAN , WI.DEMDADR , WI.DEMPOCD , WI.DEMDTLN , WI.SKUMKEY , WI.SKUTHIC , WI.SKULENG , WI.SKUWIDT , WI.SKUWEIG , WI.STKMEMO , WI.UPDTCHK FROM ${param.schema}.WASNIT WI INNER JOIN ${param.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = REGIMOD AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.MCUSMA MC ON MC.CUSTKEY = WI.CUSTCOD AND MC.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${param.schema}.MDESMA MD ON MD.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MD.CUSTKEY = WI.OWNERKY AND MD.DESTKEY = WI.DESTMOD WHERE WI.EOASNKY = #{param.eoasnky}
